title: [YTP] Pooping the Chartsmas: HappaH HolidildoH!
description:
'Tis the season for me to drop a steaming load in your earhole.  Pooping on some Christmas tunes is long overdue, I think.

This video is a little different than most of my other YTPs.  Since it's heavily reliant on audio, I used a lot of terrible motion graphics and stock photos that I'll never pay for to illustrate the stupidity!

Closed captions will be added soon if this video even manages to stay up for a week! :D

All song versions parodied, in order of appearance:
• Michael Bublé - Christmas (Baby Please Come Home)
• Lea Michele - Rockin' Around the Christmas Tree
• Frank Sinatra - White Christmas  (incorrectly labeled as Bing Crosby & using his picture)
• Ben Rector - Let It Snow
• Idina Menzel - Let It Go
• Tony Bennett - My Favorite Things (from A Family Christmas)
• Martina McBride - Frosty The Snowman
• Martina McBride - Happy Holiday (It’s The Holiday Season)
• Ben Rector - Jingle Bells
